  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing box extension on deep finish",
    "Box set back too far from the finished wall surface"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved box extension (mud ring or spark ring) to bring the box edge within 1/4 inch (6 mm) of the finished surface, or flush if the wall is combustible."
  ],
  "rationale": "The box is set back too deep into the wall finish without an extension. Per NEC 314.20, in walls or ceilings of concrete, tile, gypsum, plaster, or other noncombustible material, boxes shall be installed so that the front edge of the box will not be set back of the finished surface more than 1/4 inch. In walls and ceilings of wood or other combustible material, boxes shall be flush with the finished surface or project therefrom.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 314.20",
    "NEC 314.16"
  ]
}
